Bus Timings

Awir New Shabia 1 Bus Stop in Dubai: Route and Stop Info

August 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Awir, New Shabia 1 Bus Stop is a crucial transit point located in the Al Awir area of Dubai. This bus stop serves as a key connector for both locals and visitors, offering convenient access to a variety of amenities and services. Whether you’re commuting to work or exploring the local area, this bus stop provides essential transportation options in a vibrant part of Dubai.

Address

Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google Maps directions here.

Positioned in a bustling neighborhood, the Awir, New Shabia 1 Bus Stop is integrated into Dubai’s extensive public transportation network. Its location provides easy access to nearby facilities and attractions, making it an important hub for travel within the area.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Awir, New Shabia 1 Bus Stop is served by the E16 bus route, providing regular service throughout the day. Below are the departure times from this stop:

  • 07:26 AM

  • 09:18 AM
  • 11:22 AM
  • 01:31 PM
  • 03:26 PM
  • 05:28 PM
  • 07:25 PM
  • 09:29 PM
  • 11:26 PM

Bus Route Details

The E16 route operates between Al Sabkha Bus Station and Hatta Bus Station. Here’s an overview of the service:

  • E16 Route: This route connects Al Sabkha Bus Station to Hatta Bus Station, covering key locations in Dubai. Buses run from early morning until late at night from the Awir, New Shabia 1 stop. This service provides essential connectivity for passengers traveling between major transit hubs and important destinations.

Nearby Destinations

Cafeterias

  • Zaffaran Al Aweer Cafe & Cafeteria: Offers a mix of local and international food options.
  • New Al Aweer Cafeteria: A popular spot for quick meals and snacks.
  • Koukh Al Shay Cafeteria: Specializes in beverages and light meals.
  • Almazb Mandi Cafeteria: Renowned for its traditional mandi dishes.

Landmarks

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Al Rizzi Mosque: A significant religious site and community gathering place.

  • Al Awir Second Park: A local park offering recreational spaces and facilities.
  • Emirates NBD: A major banking institution providing various financial services.
  • Beljafla Majlis: A cultural and community center for local events.
  • Anas Bin Malik: Likely refers to a well-known local landmark or residence.

Shopping Centers

  • Omar Abdulla Supermarket Shopping Mall: Features a range of retail stores and services.

  • Al Awir Commercial Building Shopping Mall: A commercial hub with various shops and amenities.
  • Maryam Saif Building Cafeteria: Offers food and beverage services within a commercial building.
  • Sarooshfar Tire Repairing & Oil Change Shopping Mall: Specializes in automotive services.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Regency Home Health Care Centre LLC: Provides home healthcare services and medical support.

Pharmacies

  • Al Farahidi Pharmacy LLC: Offers a wide range of pharmaceutical products and services.

  • Al Awir Vet Pharmacy: Specializes in veterinary medicines and pet care products.
  • Veterinarian For Veterinary Medicines: Provides specialized veterinary medicines and consultations.
  • Al Khawaneej Pharmacy: Known for its comprehensive selection of medicines and health products.

Accommodation

  • Xclusive Casa Hotel Apartments: Offers comfortable and convenient lodging options for travelers.

  • Aviva United Hotel Apartments: Provides well-equipped hotel apartments for extended stays.

Nearby Stops

  1. Awir, New Shabia 2(19m): E16

The Awir, New Shabia 1 Bus Stop is a vital transit hub that connects travelers to essential services and local attractions in the Al Awir area. Its proximity to various cafeterias, landmarks, shopping centers, and healthcare facilities makes it a convenient stop for daily commutes and exploration. Whether you’re in need of a quick bite, shopping, or medical services, this bus stop provides a strategic gateway to the diverse amenities of Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
